description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, black enclosure with a glossy, marble-like finish on the front panel. Two large, circular, golden speaker cones dominate the front, each with a central black protruding element, likely representing tweeters or speaker covers. The top, sides, and back of the unit are finished in a matte black material, providing a sleek and modern appearance. The speaker cones are recessed into the front panel, and their metallic sheen contrasts with the dark enclosure. No visible control panels, display screens, or branding are present on the exterior. The overall design suggests a high-end, decorative audio device suitable for urban interiors or entertainment spaces.
description: A sleek, black rectangular stereo sound system with two prominent golden speaker cones on the front and a marble-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large golden speaker cones set in a glossy, marble-patterned black panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the black enclosure and the protrusion of the speaker cones' central elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, matte black surface with no visible features or connectors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, highlighting the enclosure's depth and the side profile of the speaker cones.
